category_sources: Official GitHub README describes zplug as a next-generation plugin manager for zsh.
source_facts.description: Next-generation plugin manager for zsh.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README heading is Zplug.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is the primary documentation surface, with installation, requirements, and usage sections.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has value https://github.com/zplug/zplug; repo returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official README says zplug manages zsh plugins, commands, and themes from GitHub, Bitbucket, oh-my-zsh, prezto, and local directories.
